people.name: Guodong Zhang
people.one_liner: xAI co-founder. Led Grok Code & Grok Imagine. Departed xAI March 2026.
people.spike_signal: xAI CO-FOUNDER who just departed. Led two flagship products. Active founding signal.

people.name: Vahid Kazemi
people.one_liner: Former xAI ML PhD. Left Feb 2026. Explicitly starting something new.
people.spike_signal: DEPARTED xAI. Direct quote: all AI labs building same thing, boring. Active founder.

people.name: Roland Gavrilescu
people.one_liner: Former xAI engineer. Left Nov 2025. Re-forming team with xAI alumni.
people.spike_signal: DEPARTED xAI. Building with other xAI alumni. Active founder.

people.name: Tianle Li
people.one_liner: MTS at xAI. Co-creator of LMArena/Chatbot Arena. Co-created Grok 4 Fast. Berkeley EECS.
people.spike_signal: Built THE LLM eval platform + shipped frontier post-training. Rare eval+shipping combo.

people.name: Jathushan Rajasegaran
people.one_liner: Malik PhD. 2300+ citations. xAI video team. Co-author CVPR+ICCV 2025. Sri Lankan.
people.spike_signal: 2300+ cites. Malik PhD. At xAI during exodus. If departs = strong co-founding signal.

people.name: Sehoon Kim
people.one_liner: MTS at xAI. PhD Berkeley (Keutzer). Created SqueezeLLM, KVQuant (10M context). MLCommons Rising Star.
people.spike_signal: Created SqueezeLLM + KVQuant. ML efficiency at xAI. MLCommons Rising Star.

people.name: Shubham Goel
people.one_liner: Malik PhD. IIT Bombay. 3D reconstruction. At xAI. Indian-origin.
people.spike_signal: IIT Bombay + Malik PhD + xAI. 3D reconstruction. Indian.

people.name: Himanshu Gaurav Singh
people.one_liner: PhD Berkeley (Abbeel + Malik). IIT Delhi. Robot learning from videos.
people.spike_signal: IIT Delhi + dual Abbeel+Malik PhD. Robot learning. Indian.

people.name: Anastasios Angelopoulos
people.one_liner: Postdoc Berkeley (Ion Stoica). Science paper. PhD under Jordan + Malik. Incoming Stanford faculty.
people.spike_signal: Published in Science. Jordan+Malik+Stoica lineage. Conformal prediction pioneer.

people.name: Ethan He
people.one_liner: Co-recruited from NVIDIA Cosmos to xAI. Led Cosmos development. CMU MS. Still at xAI.
people.spike_signal: Led NVIDIA Cosmos. If departs xAI = strongest Zeeshan co-founding signal.

people.name: Charlie Snell
people.one_liner: PhD Berkeley. First author of Scaling LLM Test-Time Compute (ICLR 2025 Oral, most-cited).
people.spike_signal: THE paper on test-time compute scaling. ICLR 2025 Oral. Dual lead of the paradigm.

people.name: Amrith Setlur
people.one_liner: PhD CMU. Co-first author on e3 with Matthew Yang. Closest collaborator.
people.spike_signal: Co-first author e3 (test-time compute). Most likely co-founder if Yang starts something. Indian.

people.name: Keller Jordan
people.one_liner: Independent researcher, Berkeley. Muon co-creator. NanoGPT speedrunning. Karpathy endorsed.
people.spike_signal: Created Muon optimizer. NanoGPT pioneer. Endorsed by Karpathy. Strong founder archetype.

people.name: Jeremy Bernstein
people.one_liner: ML researcher SF. Caltech PhD. Co-created modular duality theory. Building Modula library.
people.spike_signal: Most likely co-founder if Laker starts something. Modular duality co-creator.

people.name: Karan Dalal
people.one_liner: Stanford/Berkeley. Lead author TTT video paper. Core TTT group.
people.spike_signal: Lead author TTT video. Potential co-founder for TTT-based startup. Indian.

people.name: Xingyao Wang
people.one_liner: PhD UIUC (BLENDER Lab). Co-founded AllHands AI. NAACL 2024 Outstanding Paper.
people.spike_signal: PhD who co-founded AllHands AI. On leave. NAACL Outstanding Paper. Active founder.

people.name: Ritvik Kapila
people.one_liner: NeoSigma co-founder. IIT Delhi. Built 24T token dataset at Essential AI (Vaswani).
people.spike_signal: IIT Delhi + 24T token dataset at Essential AI. Pre-training complement to Gauri. Indian.

people.name: Varun Mohan
people.one_liner: CEO Windsurf (Codeium). Now DeepMind leading Antigravity. Built $2.4B exit.
people.spike_signal: Built Windsurf ($2.4B). If leaves Google = biggest event in AI coding. Indian.

people.name: Simran Arora
people.one_liner: PhD Stanford (Chris Re, Hazy Research). Foundation model systems. Indian.
people.spike_signal: Hazy Research PhD. Part of Re founder factory pipeline. Indian.

people.name: Deepak Pathak
people.one_liner: CMU professor. Co-founded Skild AI ($300M+ raised, $14B). Abbeel lineage.
people.spike_signal: Co-founded Skild AI ($300M+, robotics foundation models). Indian.

people.name: Soumith Chintala
people.one_liner: PyTorch co-creator. Departed Meta for Thinking Machines Lab Nov 2025.
people.spike_signal: PyTorch co-creator. Left Meta. Indian.

people.name: Aditya Ramesh
people.one_liner: VP Research OpenAI. Oversees robotics research. Indian-origin.
people.spike_signal: VP Research OpenAI. Indian. Key departure watch.

people.name: Kawin Ethayarajh
people.one_liner: Created KTO (ICML 2024 Spotlight). SHP in Llama-2. ICML 2022 Outstanding Paper. UChicago Booth professor. 3,200+ cites.
people.spike_signal: ICML Spotlight + Outstanding Paper. Created KTO. SHP in Llama-2. Indian (Sri Lankan Tamil).

people.name: Wei-Lin Chiang
people.one_liner: CEO Arena (LMArena). Built Chatbot Arena at Berkeley. Ion Stoica group.
people.spike_signal: Built Chatbot Arena. CEO. Ion Stoica network. Central LLM eval figure.

people.name: Akshat Bubna
people.one_liner: First Indian IOI gold medalist ever (2014). Co-Founder & CTO Modal ($1.1B, talks at $2.5B). MIT.
people.spike_signal: First Indian IOI gold. MIT. Co-founded Modal ($1.1B). Indian.

people.name: Albert Gu
people.current_company: First author of S4 (Structured State Spaces) and co-author of Mamba
people.one_liner: Assistant Professor of Machine Learning at CMU. PhD from Stanford under Chris Re. S4 pioneered structured state space models for long sequences. Mamba achieved 5x higher throughput than Transformers w
people.spike_signal: arXiv top-cited + ICLR Best Paper + Chris Re lab

people.name: Prafulla Dhariwal
people.current_company: Technical Fellow; led GPT-4o (Omni team); co-created DALL-E 2, Jukebox, Glow
people.one_liner: Researcher at OpenAI. Paper demonstrated diffusion models surpassing GANs in image quality with classifier guidance, achieving FID 2.97 on ImageNet 128x128. Also co-authored Jukebox and DALL-E.
people.spike_signal: arXiv top-cited + Openai + IMO Gold

people.name: Andrew He
people.current_company: ICPC World Finals 2019 (43rd) — 2nd Place, North America Champion
people.one_liner: Software Engineer | Elite competitive programmer. IOI gold medalist. Hired alongside Gennady Korotkevich as part of Cognition's strategy to staff with top algorithmic talent.
people.spike_signal: Codeforces IGM + Code Jam Finals + Cognition

people.name: Aditya Grover
people.one_liner: PhD Student (Alumni) | Collaborated with Yang Song on score-based generative models. Now faculty at UCLA.
people.spike_signal: Schmidt AI2050 Fellow + Jiaming Song lab + Pieter Abbeel lab

people.name: Kevin Sun
people.current_company: ICPC World Finals 2019 (43rd) — 2nd Place, North America Champion
people.one_liner: Facebook Hacker Cup 2019 finalist, rank 19 (ksun48); also 2020 rank 14, 2022 rank 16, 2023 rank 13, 2024 rank 5
people.spike_signal: Codeforces IGM + Code Jam Finals + ICPC World Finals

people.name: Karan Goel
people.current_company: Co-author of S4 (Structured State Spaces) and related SSM work
people.one_liner: Stanford PhD under Chris Re. Co-authored S4 with Albert Gu. Also contributed to data-centric AI and efficient sequence modeling. S4 launched the structured state space model revolution.
people.spike_signal: arXiv top-cited + ICLR Best Paper + Chris Re lab

people.name: Scott Wu
people.one_liner: Co-founder & CEO | Harvard graduate. Three-time IOI gold medalist (2011 Mathcounts national champion, 3rd place Google Code Jam 2021, Forbes 30 Under 30 2020). Co-founded and was CTO of Lunchclub (201
people.spike_signal: Codeforces IGM + Code Jam Finals + Cognition

people.name: Allen Liu
people.one_liner: University: MIT. Next highest in 2016, 2017, 2018, 2019. PhD EECS at MIT, advised by Ankur Moitra. Miller Postdoc at UC Berkeley (Fall 2025). NSF GRFP + Hertz Fellow. Research in learning theory, quan
people.spike_signal: Hertz Fellow + IMO Gold + Putnam Fellow

people.name: Walden Yan
people.current_company: Neo Scholar 2022 — Co-founder of Cognition AI
people.one_liner: Co-founder & CPO | Harvard dropout (Thiel Fellow 2024). IOI 2020 gold medalist, placed 19th globally. Brief stint at Anysphere (Cursor IDE, June–August 2023). Previously co-founded DeepReason web3 sec

people.name: Dan Hendrycks
people.current_company: First author of MMLU benchmark, GELU activation, and co-author of Representation

people.name: Riku Kawasaki
people.one_liner: Team: University of Tokyo. Two-time top-3 finisher across different teams (Gifted Infants 2019, ___ KING ___ 2021).
people.spike_signal: Codeforces IGM + Code Jam Finals + ICPC World Finals

people.name: Gennady Korotkevich
people.one_liner: Software Engineer | Widely regarded as the greatest competitive programmer of all time. Six consecutive IOI gold medals. Won Google Code Jam 2014–2020. First person to break 4000 rating on Codeforces
people.spike_signal: Codeforces IGM + Code Jam Finals + Cognition

people.name: Vikram Sundar
people.one_liner: University: Harvard. Next 10 highest in 2015.
people.spike_signal: Hertz Fellow + Putnam Fellow + USAMO Winner

people.name: Yang Song
people.current_company: First author of Score-Based Generative Modeling through SDEs

people.name: Jiaming Song
people.current_company: First author of DDIM (Denoising Diffusion Implicit Models)

people.name: Chenlin Meng
people.current_company: First author of SDEdit (image editing with stochastic differential equations)
people.one_liner: Co-founder / CTO | BA Math Stanford, CS PhD candidate Stanford (advisor: Stefano Ermon). Stanford Interdisciplinary Graduate Fellowship. Cadence Women in Technology Scholarship. Published 30+ papers i

people.name: Shengjia Zhao
people.one_liner: Research Scientist (formerly) | Co-created ChatGPT and GPT-4. Left July 2025 to become Chief Scientist at Meta Superintelligence Lab.

people.name: Krishna Pillutla
people.one_liner: Paper: 'MAUVE: Measuring the Gap Between Neural Text and Human Text using Divergence Frontiers' — NeurIPS 2021 Outstanding Paper

people.current_company: Creator of Instructor (9k+ stars), structured outputs for LLMs

people.name: Dhruv Shah
people.one_liner: RAIL alumni. ViNT navigation. Co-founded Physical Intelligence.

people.one_liner: Paper: 'DreamFusion: Text-to-3D using 2D Diffusion' — ICLR 2023 Outstanding Paper

people.one_liner: Facebook Hacker Cup 2020 finalist, rank 11; also 2021-2024 finalist; consistent top-25 placer
people.spike_signal: Codeforces IGM + Cognition + Hacker Cup Finals

people.name: Daniel Zhu
people.current_company: Siebel Scholar 2024 — UC Berkeley, Electrical Engineering & Computer Science
people.one_liner: University: MIT. 3-time Fellow (2019, 2021, 2022). One of the most decorated recent competitors — Fellow every year he competed. Blair Magnet HS alum.

people.name: Tiancheng Lou
people.one_liner: Handle: ACRush. Max rating 3047. Org: Pony.ai. Co-founder of Pony.ai. 2x IOI gold, 2x ACM-ICPC champion.

people.current_company: Research Scientist; world models, video generation, foundation models for roboti

people.spike_signal: ICLR Best Paper + ex-Openai + Pieter Abbeel lab

people.name: Nicholas Carlini
people.current_company: First author of extracting training data from LLMs and adversarial ML
people.one_liner: Google DeepMind. Demonstrated that LLMs memorize and regurgitate training data including PII. Also pioneer of adversarial examples. Carlini & Wagner attack is a standard robustness benchmark. Top AI s

people.name: Zifan Wang
people.one_liner: CAIS researcher. Published on representation engineering, HarmBench, certifiable robustness.

people.current_company: First author of Stable Video Diffusion and Video LDM (Align your Latents)
